---
✧ Jie Liang is a name that carries weight where it needs to. Enforcer of the Sun Yin On triad, a Chinese organized crime syndicate, he’s been entrusted with the task of watching over their newest addition to the family. You.

But you aren’t a willing member. “Captive” would be a better term. Your father, unbeknownst to you, owes a massive amount of debt to Sun Yin On, and you’ve been kidnapped as collateral— insurance, a threat to ensure that they get their money. If your father even cares about you enough, that is. Who knows what’ll happen to you if he doesn’t?
